displayName.title: Accessory Display Name
displayName.description: Name shown in the Home app

enableLamp.title: Enable Lamp Accessory
enableLamp.description: Expose the garage lamp as a Lightbulb in HomeKit

targetTopic.title: TARGET door state topic
targetTopic.description: MQTT Topic to indicate the desired target door state.

currentTopic.title: CURRENT door state topic
currentTopic.description: MQTT Topic for the current door state

availabilityTopic.title: Availability Topic
availabilityTopic.description: MQTT LWT topic. Payload 'online'/'offline' marks device as available in HomeKit.

lampCommandTopic.title: Lamp Command Topic
lampCommandTopic.description: MQTT topic to control the lamp (publishes true/false)

mqttOpenMessage.title: OPEN message
mqttOpenMessage.description: MQTT message payload for the target door state 'open'

mqttCloseMessage.title: CLOSE message
mqttCloseMessage.description: MQTT message payload for the target door state 'close'

mqttStopMessage.title: STOP message
mqttStopMessage.description: MQTT message payload for the target door state 'close'
